title: Analysis & Discovery
summary: Understand the audience, the gap, and the constraints before designing anything.
primer: [Placeholder primer] What's the actual performance gap? Who is the learner, really? What constraints shape what we can build?

title: Strategy
summary: Decide what kind of learning experience this needs to be, and why.
primer: [Placeholder primer] Modality, sequencing, business outcomes — the bets we're making.

title: Curriculum
summary: Shape the arc — modules, outcomes, the learner journey.
primer: [Placeholder primer] What does the learner need to know, in what order, and to what depth?

title: Development
summary: Build the assets — slides, video, code, copy.
primer: [Placeholder primer] Production. Where AI compresses weeks into hours — if you let it.

title: Plan
primer: [Placeholder primer] The unglamorous work that determines whether anyone actually shows up.

title: Execution
summary: Deliver the experience to real learners.
primer: [Placeholder primer] Live or async — the moment training meets reality.

title: Measurement
summary: Find out whether it worked, on the dimensions that matter.
primer: [Placeholder primer] Beyond smile sheets — behavior change, business impact.

title: Improvement
summary: Iterate. Training is a product, not a project.
primer: [Placeholder primer] What signals do we listen to, and how do we close the loop?

title: Project Management
summary: Keep the work moving — scope, schedule, stakeholders, and risk.
primer: [Placeholder primer] The connective tissue across every stage.
